name: Bangkok Chain Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Bangkok Chain Hospital Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of hospitals in Thailand. It operates thirteen chained hospital branches and one polyclinic. The company also offers tertiary care and diagnosis services; and consulting, operating management, and asset management and procurement services, as well as rents properties. In addition, it sells healthy drinks; and provides medical analysis and research services. Bangkok Chain Hospital Public Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Nonthaburi, Thailand.
